Class PineconeVectorStoreProperties

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.pinecone.autoconfigure.PineconeVectorStoreProperties
@ConfigurationProperties("spring.ai.vectorstore.pinecone") public class PineconeVectorStoreProperties extends Object
Configuration properties for Pinecone Vector Store.
Author:
Christian Tzolov, Thomas Vitale
